mapper.sql: u.userid AS user_id, u.username, u.password_hash, u.department, u.province, u.city, u.employee_id, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.last_login_at, COALESCE(string_agg(DISTINCT r.role_name, ',' ORDER BY r.role_name), '') AS roles
FROM ai_users u LEFT JOIN ai_user_roles ur ON ur.user_id = u.userid LEFT JOIN ai_roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE u.userid = #{userId} GROUP BY u.userid, u.username, u.password_hash, u.department, u.province, u.city, u.employee_id, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.last_login_at

SELECT
WHERE u.userid = #{userId} AND u.enabled = true GROUP BY u.userid, u.username, u.password_hash, u.department, u.province, u.city, u.employee_id, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.last_login_at

SELECT
WHERE u.username = #{username} GROUP BY u.userid, u.username, u.password_hash, u.department, u.province, u.city, u.employee_id, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.last_login_at

SELECT
WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.enabled = true GROUP BY u.userid, u.username, u.password_hash, u.department, u.province, u.city, u.employee_id, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.last_login_at

SELECT
WHERE u.userid = #{userId} GROUP BY u.userid, u.username, u.password_hash, u.department, u.province, u.city, u.employee_id, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.last_login_at

SELECT
GROUP BY u.userid, u.username, u.password_hash, u.department, u.province, u.city, u.employee_id, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.last_login_at ORDER BY u.created_at DESC, u.userid ASC
